channel.title: GitHub CMake Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of CMake in GitHub

item.title: SergiusTheBest/FindWDK
item.description: CMake module for building drivers with Windows Development Kit (WDK)

item.title: ros-planning/navigation_msgs
item.description: Message packages required by the navigation stack

item.title: corrosion-rs/corrosion
item.description: Marrying Rust and CMake - Easy Rust and C/C++ Integration!

item.title: minecraft-linux/mcpelauncher-manifest
item.description: The main repository for the Linux and Mac OS Bedrock edition Minecraft launcher.

item.title: TheLartians/ModernCppStarter
item.description: 🚀 Kick-start your C++! A template for modern C++ projects using CMake, CI, code coverage, clang-format, reproducible dependency management and much more.
